languages.text: Whenever attacking a target within 3 cell radius with a single target attack, follow it up with a shot from this eye, dealing {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} energy damage with {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} penetration. This attack deals +35% critical damage to targets with {g|f:67ea9e6b76b347359ab2cbc7a3be143c}Prey{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} energy damage with {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} armour penetration.

languages.text:
Совершив атаку по одной цели в радиусе 3 клеток, обладатель аугмента немедленно производит выстрел из этого аугмента и наносит {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетического урона{/g} с {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.
Если цель отмечена как {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}добыча{/g}, эта атака наносит на 35% больше {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критического урона{/g}.

Совершив атаку по одной цели в радиусе 3 клеток, обладатель аугмента немедленно производит выстрел из этого аугмента и наносит {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетического урона{/g} с {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.

languages.text:
Cada vez que el usuario realiza un ataque contra un solo objetivo situado en un radio de 3 casillas, efectúa un disparo con este aumento inmediatamente después. Este disparo inflige {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} de {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}daño de energía{/g} con un {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.
Si el objetivo está designado como {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}presa{/g}, este ataque inflige un +35 % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}daño crítico{/g} adicional.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. languages.text:
Führt der Nutzer einen Einzelziel-Angriff auf ein Ziel in einem Radius von 3 Feldern aus, schießt er unmittelbar danach mit dieser Augmentation. Dieser Angriff verursacht {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g} mit {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.
Ist das Ziel als {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}Beute{/g} markiert, verursacht dieser Angriff +35 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Schaden{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. languages.text:
Kullanıcı, 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki bir hedefe tek hedefli bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde hemen ardından bu ogmentle bir atış yapar. Bu atış, %{uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}enerji hasarı{/g} verir.
Hedef, {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}av{/g} olarak işaretlenmişse aynı saldırı +%35 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text:
Chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque à cible unique contre une cible située dans un rayon de 3 cases, il décoche un tir avec cette augmentation immédiatement après. Le tir inflige {uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} points de {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}dégâts d'énergie{/g} avec {uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.
Si la cible est désignée comme une {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}proie{/g}, cette attaque inflige +35 % de {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}dégâts critiques{/g} supplémentaires.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. languages.text:
每当使用者对3格内的目标进行单体攻击后，会立即使用此植入物射击一次，造成附带{uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}点{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}能量伤害{/g}。
若目标被标记为{g|Encyclopedia:Prey}猎物{/g}，此攻击额外造成35%{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击伤害{/g}。

Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. languages.text:
使用者が半径3マス以内の対象に単体攻撃を行うたびに、直後にこのオーグメティックで射撃を行う。これは{uip|Damage|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}の{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}を{uip|Penetration|86c125fb2c7c4b43bc2a92dc79081813}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で与える。
対象が{g|Encyclopedia:Prey}獲物{/g}としてマークされている場合、この攻撃は{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルダメージ{/g}が+35%増加する。
